userStories.title: Expose preprocessing parameters via CLI
acceptanceCriteria: Can set baseline/normalize/denoise and key params from CLI
Pipeline runs and produces results/metrics.json
Guardrail passes or does not regress RMSE_mean

userStories.title: Make PCA n_components configurable + include in optimization search
acceptanceCriteria: CLI supports --n_components (or config equivalent)
Optuna can search n_components in a bounded range
Best RMSE_mean improves or stays within tolerance
userStories.notes: RMSE_mean improved from 3.314 to 2.930 (11.6%). Optimal n_components: 95

userStories.title: Add preprocessing parameter optimization
acceptanceCriteria: Optuna searches baseline_lam (1e4-1e8), baseline_p (0.001-0.1)
Optuna searches savgol_window (5-31 odd), savgol_polyorder (2-5)
Joint optimization with model hyperparameters
RMSE_mean improves or stays within tolerance
userStories.notes: RMSE_mean improved from 2.930 to 2.907 (0.8%). Optimal: baseline_lam=4.16e5, baseline_p=0.026, savgol_window=13, savgol_polyorder=4, n_components=86

userStories.title: Add feature selection methods to optimization
acceptanceCriteria: Support wavelength selection (correlation, variance, f_score)
Optuna can choose between PCA vs wavelength_selection
Optuna can search n_selected_wavelengths (100-1000)
RMSE_mean improves or stays within tolerance
userStories.notes: RMSE_mean: 2.907 (no regression). PCA outperforms wavelength_selection on this dataset. New flags: --optimize_features, --selection_method, --n_selected_wavelengths

userStories.title: Add ensemble model support
acceptanceCriteria: Support stacking/voting ensemble of top models
CLI flag --ensemble to enable
Combine predictions from PLS + Ridge + RF
RMSE_mean improves or stays within tolerance
userStories.notes: RMSE_mean: 2.907 (no regression). Ensemble CV score ~2.86. New flags: --ensemble, --ensemble_method (stacking/voting), --ensemble_models

userStories.title: Add per-target model optimization
acceptanceCriteria: Train separate optimized model per target element
Each target can have different optimal hyperparameters
CLI flag --per_target to enable
Overall RMSE_mean improves or stays within tolerance
userStories.notes: RMSE_mean: 2.912 (within tolerance of baseline 2.907). Per-target allows different alpha per element: C=9590, Si=9922, Mn=9824, Cr=8755, Mo=276, Ni=7099, Cu=217, Fe=5398

userStories.title: Add deep learning model to pipeline
acceptanceCriteria: 1D-CNN model available via --model cnn
Works on CPU (GPU optional)
Optuna can tune CNN hyperparameters (channels, kernel_size, dropout)
Compare performance with traditional models
userStories.notes: CNN model added via --model cnn. With optimization (10 trials), CNN RMSE ~3.04 vs Ridge ~2.91. CNN works on CPU (auto-falls back from unsupported CUDA). Optuna tunes channels, kernel_size, dropout, learning_rate, batch_size.

userStories.title: Logit target variable transformation for low-concentration elements
acceptanceCriteria: New src/target_transform.py with LogitTargetTransformer class
CLI flags --logit_transform and --logit_elements (default: C Si Mo Cu)
Transform applied to y_train before fitting; inverse applied before metrics
predict.py supports LOGIT_TRANSFORM=True flag
Mo R² improves from -0.199 toward positive values, C RMSE decreases
userStories.notes: Based on FORTH team (1st place, LIBS 2022 competition, Siozos et al. 2023). Logit maps [0,100] wt% to (-inf,+inf), expanding the low-concentration region.

userStories.title: CNN two-phase weighted loss + spectral data augmentation
acceptanceCriteria: CNNRegressor supports element_weights dict and augment=True parameters
Phase 1 (first 1/3 epochs): up-weights C:2.0, Mo:2.0, Cu:1.5, Si:1.5
Phase 2 (remaining epochs): uniform weights
Augmentation: intensity jitter [0.65,1.35] + wavelength masking (0-50 channels)
CLI flags --cnn_weighted_loss and --cnn_augment
CNN RMSE approaches Ridge baseline (~2.91)
userStories.notes: Based on DD team (3rd place, LIBS 2022 competition). Addresses the issue where low-concentration element errors are masked by Fe/Cr/Ni large absolute errors during training.

userStories.title: SDVS feature selection adapted for single-measurement LIBS data
acceptanceCriteria: New select_wavelengths_sdvs() function in src/features.py
Uses quantile-binning approximation (n_bins=10) for within-class scatter
Registered as 'sdvs' in FeatureExtractor selection_method
CLI: --feature_method wavelength_selection --selection_method sdvs
RMSE_mean does not regress vs baseline
userStories.notes: Based on SIA team (2nd place, LIBS 2022 competition). Original SDVS requires repeat measurements; adapted to single-measurement using quantile bins as pseudo-classes.
